summary: Comprehensive testing of $DEEPOTUS landing page with 3 new features completed: admin dashboard with password authentication, dark mode toggle, and AI-generated hero image. All backend admin endpoints working correctly with proper authentication. Frontend admin dashboard fully functional with login/logout, data tables, and export capabilities. Dark mode toggle working across all pages with localStorage persistence. Hero image loading successfully. All existing landing page features remain functional (regression testing passed).
passed_tests: Backend API endpoints (17/17): All original endpoints + 6 new admin endpoints
Admin login with correct password 'deepotus2026' returns token and expires_at
Admin login with wrong password returns 401 'Access denied'
Admin whitelist endpoint with X-Admin-Token header returns items and total
Admin whitelist endpoint without token returns 401
Admin chat-logs endpoint with X-Admin-Token header returns items and total
Admin chat-logs endpoint without token returns 401
Admin login page renders with all required data-testids
Admin dashboard shows 4 stat cards and 2 tabs with data tables
Admin export CSV buttons present and functional
Admin logout and refresh buttons working correctly
Theme toggle present on landing nav, footer, and admin pages
Dark mode toggles correctly, adds/removes html.dark class
Dark mode persists in localStorage with key 'deepotus_theme'
Dark mode applies visually to all sections without breaking layout
Hero image /deepotus_hero.jpg loads successfully (928x1152, returns 200)
Bilingual FR/EN toggle working correctly
Live countdown timer updating every second
AI Prophet chat functionality working
Whitelist email form with success message
Navigation and mobile responsiveness working
All major sections rendering correctly in both light and dark modes

success_percentage.backend: 100% (17/17 tests passed - all original + new admin endpoints)
success_percentage.frontend: 100% (22/22 tests passed - admin dashboard, dark mode, hero image, regression)
